# The K-Beauty Data Desk тАФ full fact digest

> Captured Olive Young aggregate review data, with scoped topic counts, metadata flags, and explicit limits. One section per covered product. Ratings, counts, and star shares are captured Olive Young Korea aggregates; publication dates and summaries are site metadata. Individual reviews are never quoted.
